summary: Dashboard loading state shows proper mobile narrow layout with authenticated UI chrome, but uses neutral gray palette instead of required diner brand colors, creating visual brand inconsistency.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces - background appears as generic white/gray rather than required cream (#fff8ea) or other diner palette colors
Authenticated dashboard surface uses generic palette creating brand discontinuity from public marketing surfaces, reducing perceived product quality

actions: Apply diner brand palette to authenticated dashboard surfaces per M.universal.1
Ensure visual consistency between public and logged-in routes per P.brand_palette_consistency
Replace neutral gray backgrounds with cream (#fff8ea) or other appropriate diner palette colors
